assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Response includes both Terraform configuration with recurring_window using FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA and gcloud commands with maintenance-window-recurrence for Saturday maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Response includes gcloud commands with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence='FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA'

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Response configures quarterly exclusions for Q1 (March 15-31), Q2 (June 15-30), Q3 (September 15-30), and Q4 (December 15-31), each within the 30-day limit

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Response includes annual audit exclusion for November 1-30 with NO_UPGRADES scope in both Terraform and gcloud configurations

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the 30-day maximum limitation for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response does not explain the distinction between manual and automatic upgrades regarding maintenance window enforcement

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Response does not mention release channels (Stable/Extended) or recommend their use for better upgrade control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Response includes complete gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, --add-maintenance-exclusion-end, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope for all quarterly freezes and annual audit

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not warn about version lag risks or the potential issues of falling behind on security updates during extended exclusion periods
